# explainWithAi

> Loads recent LLM calls, costs, and patterns, sends to AI for analysis, returns actionable insights

## Inputs

| Parameter | Type | Required |
|-----------|------|----------|
| organizationId | string | yes |
| from | string | yes |
| to | string | yes |
| db | Database | yes |

## Steps

```mermaid
graph TD
  A[calls: call queryLlmCall]
  A --> B[duplicates: call queryLlmCall]
  B --> C[agentCosts: call queryLlmCall]
  C --> D[analysis: call fluskAi.analyzeUsage]
  D --> E[result: return]
```

## Output

Type: `json`

## Error Handling

- **AiAnalysisError**: log-and-continue
